final_prompt.prompt:
Generate an original, non-infringing 3×3 grid infographic poster for Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) social media, designed to be sliced into 9 individual posts for a female-oriented wellness lifestyle account.

Style/medium: clean editorial infographic, magazine-quality layout, soft cream and beige color palette, ins-style aesthetic with gentle 3D illustrated accents, pillow, moon, stars, hot milk, aromatherapy, book, eye mask, curtain, bed elements
Composition: 3 columns × 3 rows grid layout with clear visible borders between cells, each cell centered and complete, generous whitespace, no text crossing grid lines, vertical 3:4 aspect ratio optimized for mobile viewing
Subject: sleep wellness tips with 9 distinct mini-cards, each featuring large readable Chinese typography, soft cream white, light beige, pale oatmeal, light caramel tones with dark brown text accents
Scene/backdrop: warm healing atmosphere, bedroom cozy setting, night time mood, unified visual language across all 9 cells
Lighting/mood: soft diffused warm lighting, calming and therapeutic mood, gentle shadows
Color palette: cream white as base, light beige and oatmeal as secondary, light caramel as accent, dark brown for typography, monochromatic warm harmony
Materials/textures: matte paper texture, soft fabric feel for bedding elements, subtle grain for warmth
Text (verbatim): "让你倒头就睡的8个 tips", "失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏", "1. 睡前1小时别玩手机", "蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。", "2. 睡前把灯光调暗", "暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。", "3. 房间温度别太高", "稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。", "4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡", "咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。", "5. 睡前洗个热水澡", "能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。", "6. 脑子停不下来就写下来", "把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。", "7. 固定上床时间", "每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。", "8. 试试深呼吸放松法", "吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。", "收藏这组，今晚试试看"
Constraints: must be a perfect 3×3 grid with visible dividers for clean slicing; each cell must work as standalone Xiaohongshu post; all text must be Chinese, no English; typography must be large and highly legible; maintain consistent visual style across all 9 cells
Avoid: cheap marketing aesthetic, overly flashy decorations, cluttered layouts, small unreadable text, English text, text crossing grid boundaries, mismatched styles between cells, 8K stuffer words, watermark
